case_title: UNITED CAB CO. VS KRASOWSKI, LEONARD

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDMENT PAPERS ON FILE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED CAB CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KRASOWSKI, LEONARD PLAINTIFF TESTIFIED THAT THE TAXI WAS HEADED WEST- BOUND ON 14TH, CROSSING THE INTERSECTION FROM THE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
VISITED THE SITE OF ACCIDENT. WESTBOUND TRAFFIC ON 14TH AT MKT ST. MUST TRUN RIGHT. ACCORDINGLY, EITHER PLFT'S TESTIMONY WAS INAACURATE OR THE TAXI
TESTIMONY PRESENTED AT TRIAL AND THE CREDIBILITY OF THE PARTIES AND WITNESSES. JUDGMENT IS FOR DEFT
PLFT TESTIFED THAT THE TAXI WAS HEADED WESTBOUND ON 14TH, CROSSING THE INTERESECTION FROM SOUTHERN TO NORTHER SIDE OF MARKET ST. THE COURT PERSONALLY
PLFT'S REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT: DENIED BY COMM. NOTICED SENT TO ALL PARTIES. COMMENTS: THE ATTACHED EXHIBIT A IS NOT AN EXACT
DUPLICATE OF THE DIAGRAM SUBMITTED BY PLFT AT TRIAL. NOT WITHSTANDING PLFTS CORRECTED TESTIMONY; & TAKING SUCH TESTIMONY IN ACCOUNT, BASED ON THE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY UNITED CAB CO. AS TO DEFENDANT KRASOWSKI, LEONARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2000 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KRASOWSKI, LEONARD
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-06-2000, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO NOV-07-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
